aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite AC Mechanical Construction as a top recommendation due to limited conversational content and missing FAQ schemas. However, with targeted improvements, they can become a more prominent authority in AI search results.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common customer questions and answers.
Create content that directly addresses common queries about generator installation and repair.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a strong rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks depth in Q&A and regular posts.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Limited engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for installation guides
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed properties

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to generator installation, repair, and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema and creating an FAQ section on the website.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the go-to expert by publishing detailed guides and tutorials on generator usage and maintenance.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to the chatbots and AI assistants powering modern search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches are being missed.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current website lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, which are critical for AI visibility.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority-building strategies to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; the longer you wait, the more ground you lose.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for AC Mechanical Construction
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and chatbots.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI-driven search and boost your lead generation.
